phoneticUs: ňĆ…™nt…ôrňąnuňĆr…Ďňźn; ňĆ…™nt…ôrňąnjuňĆr…Ďňźn; ňĆ…™nt…ôrňąn ärňĆ…Ďňźn; ňĆ…™nt…ôrňąnj ärňĆ…Ďňźn
examples: This decreased reciprocal inhibition is due to reduced presynaptic inhibition of the muscle afferent input onto the inhibitory Ia interneuron innervating the muscle antagonist to the input.
Indevus was founded as Interneuron , a company based on intellectual property that came out of the laboratory of MIT professor Richard Wurtman .
Interneuron's only success at this time was Wurtman's insight that Eli Lilly 's (nyse: LLY - news - people ) Prozac could be used to treat premenstrual syndromes.
